title: Create More: Linked Remote
description: Adds a simple click-to-activate variant of the Create linked controller.
body:
## About
Adds a simplified version of the linked controller. Activation only needs a right-click and can only have a single frequency.

## Create More Mods
- [Linked Remote](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-linked-remote)
- [Parallel Pipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-parallel-pipes)
- [Pipe Bombs in Packages](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-pipe-bombs-in-packages)
- [Package Couriers](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-package-couriers)
- Electric Pump (WIP)
